default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential partnership between GrowthX and Acquisition.com for content creation and AI-driven organic growth](https://fathom.video/share/fsba7tMxJ1oe41S9GiJiiHk74xcWzJqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Acquisition.com seeks to expand written content creation, focusing on editorial pieces](https://fathom.video/share/fsba7tMxJ1oe41S9GiJiiHk74xcWzJqx?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [GrowthX offers AI-powered content creation, publishing, and LLM visibility tracking](https://fathom.video/share/fsba7tMxJ1oe41S9GiJiiHk74xcWzJqx?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [Potential Q1 2026 start date, with $30K upfront for 8-week strategy sprint + $15K/month for 12 months](https://fathom.video/share/fsba7tMxJ1oe41S9GiJiiHk74xcWzJqx?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Topics

### Acquisition.com's Content Needs

  - [Currently strong in video production, social media, and paid advertising](https://fathom.video/share/fsba7tMxJ1oe41S9GiJiiHk74xcWzJqx?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [Lacks written content beyond email newsletters and internal materials](https://fathom.video/share/fsba7tMxJ1oe41S9GiJiiHk74xcWzJqx?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Seeking to own non-social, non-email newsletter written content](https://fathom.video/share/fsba7tMxJ1oe41S9GiJiiHk74xcWzJqx?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
  - [Goal: attract more business owners (1M+ revenue/year) looking for scaling help](https://fathom.video/share/fsba7tMxJ1oe41S9GiJiiHk74xcWzJqx?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)

### GrowthX's Offering

  - [Daily high-quality organic content publishing for editorial purposes](https://fathom.video/share/fsba7tMxJ1oe41S9GiJiiHk74xcWzJqx?tab=summary&timestamp=645.0)
  - [8-week strategy sprint to develop AI-relevant artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/fsba7tMxJ1oe41S9GiJiiHk74xcWzJqx?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)
  - [AI-powered workflows for content creation and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/fsba7tMxJ1oe41S9GiJiiHk74xcWzJqx?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)
  - [LLM visibility tracking and analytics dashboard](https://fathom.video/share/fsba7tMxJ1oe41S9GiJiiHk74xcWzJqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1012.0)
  - [Full-service approach: strategy, creation, publishing, and analytics](https://fathom.video/share/fsba7tMxJ1oe41S9GiJiiHk74xcWzJqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)

### Differentiation from SEO Agencies

  - [Scale of quality content creation (daily publishing)](https://fathom.video/share/fsba7tMxJ1oe41S9GiJiiHk74xcWzJqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1097.0)
  - [End-to-end service: strategy, creation, CMS integration, analytics](https://fathom.video/share/fsba7tMxJ1oe41S9GiJiiHk74xcWzJqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)
  - [Proprietary AI workflow engine leveraging multiple research tools](https://fathom.video/share/fsba7tMxJ1oe41S9GiJiiHk74xcWzJqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Dedicated team: managing director, managing editor, content manager](https://fathom.video/share/fsba7tMxJ1oe41S9GiJiiHk74xcWzJqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1213.0)
  - [Focus on LLM visibility and AI-driven organic growth](https://fathom.video/share/fsba7tMxJ1oe41S9GiJiiHk74xcWzJqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)

### Pricing and Terms

  - [$30K upfront for 8-week strategy sprint (Phase 1)](https://fathom.video/share/fsba7tMxJ1oe41S9GiJiiHk74xcWzJqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)
  - [$15K/month for 12 months of growth execution (Phase 2)](https://fathom.video/share/fsba7tMxJ1oe41S9GiJiiHk74xcWzJqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [7-week opt-out period between Phase 1 and Phase 2](https://fathom.video/share/fsba7tMxJ1oe41S9GiJiiHk74xcWzJqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1749.0)
  - [Potential for quarterly payments in Phase 2](https://fathom.video/share/fsba7tMxJ1oe41S9GiJiiHk74xcWzJqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1745.0)

### Timeline and Next Steps

  - [Targeting Q1 2026 for potential start date](https://fathom.video/share/fsba7tMxJ1oe41S9GiJiiHk74xcWzJqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1804.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide additional materials:](https://fathom.video/share/fsba7tMxJ1oe41S9GiJiiHk74xcWzJqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1763.0)
      - [ROI stories and LLM analytics screenshots](https://fathom.video/share/fsba7tMxJ1oe41S9GiJiiHk74xcWzJqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1763.0)
      - [Detailed differentiators from traditional SEO agencies](https://fathom.video/share/fsba7tMxJ1oe41S9GiJiiHk74xcWzJqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1895.0)
      - [Draft Statement of Work (SoW)](https://fathom.video/share/fsba7tMxJ1oe41S9GiJiiHk74xcWzJqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1757.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send additional materials (ROI stories, analytics screenshots, draft SoW)](https://fathom.video/share/fsba7tMxJ1oe41S9GiJiiHk74xcWzJqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1763.0)
  - [Lewis to review materials and present to Acquisition.com team for approval](https://fathom.video/share/fsba7tMxJ1oe41S9GiJiiHk74xcWzJqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1827.0)
  - [Potential follow-up call with Acquisition.com CEO and GrowthX founder](https://fathom.video/share/fsba7tMxJ1oe41S9GiJiiHk74xcWzJqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1525.0)
  - [Lewis to provide updates on internal discussions and decision-making process](https://fathom.video/share/fsba7tMxJ1oe41S9GiJiiHk74xcWzJqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1780.0)

action_items.description: Send visuals of partnership deliverables, success stories (LLM visibility, organic traffic growth), analytics screenshots, content examples, draft SoW w/ ROI stories + LLM analytics, resources on GrowthX differentiators
Review GrowthX problem-solving video, discuss partnership w/ team for approval + budget
